title: Allow duplication of integration or automations
excerpt: I would like to duplicate automations and integrations and then be able to edit them. When you get a recipe just right, but just need to change one part of it - instead of having to start all over it would be a huge time…

posts.author: DTade (dtade@nexgenhearing.com)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to duplicate automations and integrations and then be able to edit them. When you get a recipe just right, but just need to change one part of it - instead of having to start all over it would be a huge time saver to be able to duplicate and then just edit the one thing you want to change.
